zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Morville於1125年出生在英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯時，他的父親Hugh de Morville41歲，母親Beatrice de Beauchamp36歲。他與Hawise de Lancaster在英國英格蘭波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1162年在蘇格蘭被列為constable。他去世於1189年7月20日在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾德雷包享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Morville于1125年出生在英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯时，他的父亲Hugh de Morville41岁，母亲Beatrice de Beauchamp36岁。他与Hawise de Lancaster在英国英格兰波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1162年在苏格兰被列为constable。他去世于1189年7月20日在苏格兰貝維其可爾德雷包享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Morville was born in 1125, in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, his father, Hugh de Morville, was 41 and his mother, Beatrice de Beauchamp, was 36. He married Hawise de Lancaster in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1162, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as constable in Scotland. He died on 20 July 1189, in Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Morville est né en 1125, à Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Morville, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Beauchamp, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Lancaster à Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1162, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable à Écosse. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1189, à Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Morville 1125 in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Morville 41 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Beauchamp 36. Er hat in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Hawise de Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1162, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Juli 1189 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland.

Lui sposato Hawise de Lancaster nel Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1162, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable nel Scotland. Morì il 20 luglio 1189, nel Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Morvilleが1125年にイギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズで生まれた時，父Hugh de Morvilleは41歳，母Beatrice de Beauchampは36歳であった。イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドキルコスワルドでHawise de Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1162年，37歳の時，スコットランドでの職業はconstableと記録されている。彼は1189年7月20日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアドリブルグで64歳で死去した。

ko.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Morville(이)가 1125년 영국 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Morville(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Beauchamp(은)는 36세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 커코즈월드에서 Hawise de Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1162년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 constable이었다. 그는 1189년 7월 20일 스컷랜드 버윅실르 드리버그h에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Morville nasceu em 1125, em Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Morville, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Beauchamp, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Lancaster em Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1162, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable em Scotland. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1189, em Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland, com 64 anos.

ru.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Morville родился в 1125 г. в местности бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Morville было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Beauchamp, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Lancaster в местности киркосвалд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1162 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии constable в местности Шотландия. Он умер 20 июля 1189 г. в местности дрибург, бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет.

Se casó con Hawise de Lancaster en Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1162, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era constable en Scotland. Murió el 20 de julio de 1189, en Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años.
